programmes.statusNote: The official 2025-26 Regulations and Syllabuses publish the complete 60-credit MEd curriculum, 134 unique course codes, the Generalist Strand and 18 Specialist Strand specialisms. Every path includes MEDD8001 (6 credits), 42 credits of specialist and/or elective courses, and a 12-credit capstone. The Specialist paths differ: five specialisms require a named fifth Specialist Elective plus two General Electives, Teaching Chinese Language and Literature in International Education requires three Specialist Electives and MEDD8009 only, and the two International Context specialisms require at least one of two named Specialist Electives. MEDD8008 also requires an Advanced Research Methods elective. The current 2026 Fields of Studies page lists 15 offered specialisms and omits Gifted Education and Talent Development, Mathematics Education, and Teaching of Mathematics in an International Context; the Syllabuses state that not all specialisms or courses are offered every year. Annual availability, cross-role courses, prerequisites, impermissible combinations and these path conditions require manual audit review.

courseGroups.name: Compulsory Core Course
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete MEDD8001 Educational Issues and Research for 6 credits.

courses.name: Educational Issues and Research

courseGroups.name: Specialist Course Requirement
courseGroups.ruleText: Generalist students have no Specialist Course requirement. Most specialisms require four named Specialist Courses. Gifted Education and Talent Development, Guidance and Counselling, Science Education, STEM Education, and Teaching Chinese as a Second Language also require one named Specialist Elective. Teaching Chinese Language and Literature in International Education requires four Specialist Courses plus all three named Specialist Electives. Required course roles are identified by requiredForTrackIds in the course pool.

courseGroups.name: Generalist Elective Requirement
courseGroups.ruleText: Generalist Strand students complete seven General Elective Courses for 42 credits.

courseGroups.name: Specialist Strand Elective Requirement
courseGroups.ruleText: Generalist students complete seven General Electives. Most Specialist students complete three General or Specialist Electives. Five named specialisms complete two General Electives after their fifth required Specialist Elective. Teaching Chinese Language and Literature in International Education has no General Elective requirement. The two International Context specialisms complete three electives including at least one of their two named Specialist Electives.

courseGroups.name: Specialist and General Elective Course Pool
courseGroups.ruleText: The pool stores every unique 6-credit Specialist and General Elective course once. Track-specific roles are recorded in requiredForTrackIds and countsTowardTrackIds. The 22 courses tagged Advanced Research Methods satisfy the additional method-course condition for the MEDD8008 Research Project path. Not all specialisms or courses are offered every year.

courseGroups.name: Capstone Course
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete either MEDD8008 Research Project or MEDD8009 Professional Portfolio for 12 credits. MEDD8008 requires at least one Advanced Research Methods elective. Teaching Chinese Language and Literature in International Education students must complete MEDD8009 and cannot choose MEDD8008.
